title: Close heimlern OLA contract drift and repair Metrics CI
goal: Implement the narrow P1/P2 repair slice: close the additive proposal drift and restore Metrics CI to the canonical schema path with clear diagnostics.

acceptance.assertion: Contract-bound policy.weight_adjustment.v1 proposal emission excludes additive weight deltas unless the local schema fixture for this task explicitly permits them.
Metrics CI resolves the existing canonical metrics schema path.
A missing or moved schema fails closed with an explicit diagnostic naming the requested schema location.
acceptance.verifier: targeted test or workflow log excerpt

acceptance.assertion: The change is limited to contract safety and Metrics CI repair; adapter migration and E2E smoke remain follow-ups.

metadata.claude_delegation: review if contract interpretation or architecture risk appears
